title: hieracium mutabile
intro: Hieracium mutabile, also known as the variable hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and variable leaf morphology. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium mutabile include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
